name: agentlens
description: Local-first DevTools for AI agents: trace, replay, evaluate, and visualize tool-using runs.

scripts.check: node --check ./bin/agentlens.js && node --check ./src/index.js && node --check ./src/trace.js && node --check ./src/store.js && node --check ./src/demo.js && node --check ./src/inspect.js && node --check ./src/diff.js && node --check ./src/diff-dashboard.js && node --check ./src/doctor.js && node --check ./src/replay.js && node --check ./src/eval.js && node --check ./src/ci.js && node --check ./src/jsonl.js && node --check ./src/redact.js && node --check ./src/schemas.js && node --check ./src/server.js && node --check ./src/dashboard.js && node --check ./src/adapters/llm.js && node --check ./src/adapters/mcp.js && node --check ./src/adapters/mcp-stdio.js && node --check ./examples/basic-run.mjs && node --check ./examples/failing-run.mjs && node --check ./examples/mcp-tool-run.mjs && node --check ./examples/mcp-stdio-server.mjs && node --check ./examples/mcp-stdio-run.mjs && node --check ./examples/llm-wrapper-run.mjs && node --check ./examples/provider-adapters-run.mjs && node --check ./examples/jsonl-run.mjs && node --check ./scripts/launch-demo.mjs && node --check ./scripts/release-audit.mjs
scripts.verify: npm run check && npm test && npm run demo && npm run doctor && npm run inspect && npm run eval && npm run schema:trace && npm run redact:demo && npm run diff:demo && npm run diff:dashboard && npm run ci:demo && npm run demo:mcp && npm run eval:mcp && npm run demo:mcp:stdio && npm run eval:mcp:stdio && npm run demo:llm && npm run eval:llm && npm run demo:providers && npm run eval:providers && npm run demo:jsonl && npm run launch:demo && npm run dashboard && npm run release:audit
